form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish third (25.00) at this track over 435m. Leading contender.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (25.22) over 435m at this track. Has a low draw. Has ability and should run well.

formComments.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (25.22) over 435m at this track. Has a low draw. Has ability and should run well.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th on April 12 over 435m at this track behind Lakeview Mitch beaten 6 lengths (24.84) in a Grade 5. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 5th on April 12 over 435m at this track behind Lakeview Mitch beaten 6 lengths (24.84) in a Grade 5. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a 5 length third (23.45) over 400m at Warragul and making it two placings on end. Thereabouts last couple and expected to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a 5 length third (23.45) over 400m at Warragul and making it two placings on end. Thereabouts last couple and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Warragul to win by 4.5 lengths in 23.11, beating Athenian Goddess. Last start finished 5th on April 9 over 400m at Warragul behind Terrorising Tom beaten 3.5 lengths (23.68) in a Grade 5. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (26.53) at big odds over 460m at Warragul. Others preferred.

formComments.comment: Finished second last start (26.53) at big odds over 460m at Warragul. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Starting from wide draw and has been unwanted at recent poor starts. Likely to struggle this time.

formComments.comment: Starting from wide draw and has been unwanted at recent poor starts. Likely to struggle this time.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (26.64) at Warragul in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 9 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from four starts. Leading chance.
